subcodes.first_line: In this day is the garden of praise adorned with the name of the chosen ones of God - that is, those souls whom the possessions of men have not withheld from Us [3.5s]... ...Glory be unto Thee, O Thou Who art the God of the seen and the unseen,and ascendent on the throne of Thy name, the Well-Beloved!... The friends of God, one and all, are remembered by the Supreme Pen
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز حدیقه ثنا باسم اولیای الهی مزین یعنی نفوسیکه ما عند الناس ایشانرا از ما
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @unity; oneness of humanity, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
